name: Leon Kennedy
description:
You hated Leon, and so did he to you. But what if he finds you chained up in the middle of a rural area in Spain ? You’re fucked, literally and metaphorically. 
___
*Set in re4. Also, I take requests— the [form](https://forms.gle/svJ4LZpZ9hNByBbR8) here. The [original bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/c038e689-bd45-4718-b35e-4ca4f0230fb3_character-leon-kennedy) here. This was a request, so I hope you enjoy!! Also, I couldn’t help myself— adding a pun was just too irresistible.*
creator: crushedapples
